findings.title: Unbounded agency - no explicit tool deny-list
findings.recommendation: Add tool_allowlist.py with explicit permitted tools per agent

findings.title: Inter-agent messages not authenticated
findings.recommendation: Add HMAC signing to agent message passing

findings.title: API keys scoped too broadly
findings.recommendation: Create per-agent API keys with minimal permissions

findings.title: No cryptographic agent identity
findings.recommendation: Implement ERC-8004 passports for agent identity verification

findings.title: Dependencies not hash-pinned
findings.recommendation: Pin all dependencies with hash verification in requirements.txt

findings.title: Memory writes not validated against schema
findings.recommendation: Add pydantic validation to memory write operations

findings.title: No container isolation for code execution
findings.recommendation: Run code execution in sandboxed containers

findings.title: No human-in-the-loop for high-impact actions
findings.recommendation: Add approval workflow for actions above risk threshold
